name: unfamiliar-city
description: Professional skills and utilities for Claude Code

plugins.name: tuff
plugins.description: Durable step function library for LLM data pipelines. Steps cached to SQLite — re-run resumes from the first uncached step. Concurrency, retry, budget tracking built in.

plugins.name: mindshare-map
plugins.description: Maps AI mindshare: which companies ChatGPT recommends, how prominently, and which sources shape the answer. Roleplays audience personas, queries GPT-5.2 under a ChatGPT-like system prompt with web search, builds a competitive leaderboard from answers and citations.
